author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Black Torch' Announces Additional Cast, Staff
The official website for Black Torch television anime announced additional cast and staff on Friday. The anime series adapting Tsuyoshi Takaki's action supernatural manga is scheduled to premiere on Tokyo MX and other stations on July 4. Cast Toshimasa Azuma: Shinpachi Tsuji (Saigo ni Hitotsu dake Onegai shitemo Yoroshii deshou ka) Touko Kusumi: Yuuko Kaida (Tondemo Skill de Isekai Hourou Meshi) Banjuro Tokieda: Houchuu Ootsuka (Golden Kamuy) Staff Sub Character Design: Mariko Kinoshita (C...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Tetsunabe no Jan!' Reveals Additional Cast, Main Promo, Opening Theme, Summer 2026 Premiere
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Shinji Saijyo's Tetsunabe no Jan (Iron Wok Jan!) manga revealed the additional cast, opening theme, and the main promotional video on Friday. The anime series is scheduled to premiere on TV Tokyo affiliate networks every Sunday at 5:30 a.m., beginning on July 5. Cast Selene Yang: Mao Ichimichi (Isekai Nonbiri Nouka) Nitto Otani: Masuo Amada (Karaoke Iko!) Kei Sawada: Takahiro Sakurai (Shuumatsu Touring) Xun Zhixiu: Taishi Murata (S...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Mujikaku Seijo wa Kyou mo Muishiki ni Chikara wo Tare Nagasu' Reveals Additional Cast, Ending Theme, Second Promo for Summer 2026
The official website of the Mujikaku Seijo wa Kyou mo Muishiki ni Chikara wo Tare Nagasu (The Oblivious Saint Can't Contain Her Power) television anime revealed additional cast, the ending theme, second promo, and a new visual (pictured) on Friday. The anime series adapting Almond's fantasy romance light novel is scheduled to premiere on Tokyo MX, BS11, and AT-X in July 2026. Voice actors Shunichi Toki (Kanojo ga Koushaku-tei ni Itta Riyuu) and Inori Minase (Shinigami Bocchan to Kuro M...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Kidou Keisatsu Patlabor: EZY' Unveils Additional Cast, Second Trailer
The official website for the Kidou Keisatsu Patlabor: EZY (Patlabor The Mobile Police: EZY) anime revealed additional cast, File 2 key visual (pictured), and trailer on Friday. The first installment opened in theaters on May 15, and the second installment is scheduled to premiere on August 14. Cast Shigeo Shiba: Shigeru Chiba (Overlord) Kurumi Terada: Mariya Ise (Kakegurui) Youichi Satou: Hiroki Maeda (One Punch Man 2nd Season) Kanji Kunikida: Houchuu Ootsuka (Golden Kamuy) Koutarou Yasui: Kazuh...
